ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film from IMDB */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the film */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "production_budget" INTEGER /* Production budget of the film */,
  "box_office_revenue" INTEGER /* Box office revenue of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imdb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* IMDB identifier of the film the shot belongs to */,
  "frame_num" INTEGER /* Frame number of the shot */,
  "shot_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shot type */,
  "is_close_up" INTEGER /* Indicator if the shot is a close-up */,
  "is_medium_shot" INTEGER /* Indicator if the shot is a medium shot */,
  "is_long_shot" INTEGER /* Indicator if the shot is a long shot */,
  "shot_type_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score indicating the accuracy of the shot type classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_imdb_id FOREIGN KEY ("imdb_id") REFERENCES films ("imdb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_shot_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("shot_type_id") REFERENCES shot_types ("shot_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_types" (
  "shot_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot type */,
  "shot_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the shot type (e.g., close-up, medium shot) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shot type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content */,
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shot being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., visual quality, composition) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Detailed result of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shot_analysis_shot_id FOREIGN KEY ("shot_id") REFERENCES shots ("shot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving feedback */,
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shot being reviewed */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shot_feedback_shot_id FOREIGN KEY ("shot_id") REFERENCES shots ("shot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edit_sessions" (
  "edit_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each editing session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user editing the footage */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the editing session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the editing session ended */,
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* IMDB identifier of the film that is being edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edit_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edit_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the film project */,
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* IMDB identifier of the film associated with the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in production, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_projects_imdb_id FOREIGN KEY ("imdb_id") REFERENCES films ("imdb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_tags" (
  "shot_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot-tag association */,
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shot being tagged */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag being associated with the shot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shot_tags_shot_id FOREIGN KEY ("shot_id") REFERENCES shots ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shot_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_editing_software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_history" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the integration */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software being integrated */,
  "integration_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the integration event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_history_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES video_editing_software ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_history" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool used to generate the report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report generation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report generation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_history_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES reporting_tools ("tool_id")
)
